item.title: YuLan-Mini (Renmin)
item.description: Parameters: 2.4B License: open Type: model "1.08T tokens for training. Among them are 481B English web data, 138B general English knowledge, 227B code pre-training data, 16.7B code instruction data, 93.8B mathematics pre-training data, 15.5B mathematics instruction data, and 108B Chinese data."

item.title: DeepSeek-V3 (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: 685B License: open Type: model 37B active. Explain: https://threadreaderapp.com/thread/1872318161883959485.html Announce: https://github.com/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3?tab=readme-ov-file

item.title: EON-8B (LinkedIn)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: closed Type: model "We found the EON-8B model (a domain-adapted Llama 3.1-8B variant) to be 75x and 6x cost effective in comparison to GPT-4 and GPT-4o respectively (Figure 4)... On tasks seen during training, the EON-8B model outperformed base Llama-3-8B-Instruct and its performance was comparable to SOTA GPT models."

item.title: o3-preview (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 600B License: open Type: model SoTA model for Dec/2024. Parameter estimate is very rough centrepoint for range 400B-52T.

item.title: RWKV-7 Goose (RWKV)
item.description: Parameters: 0.4B License: open Type: model RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN: "multilingual, supporting over 100 languages and code.". Full run is 332B tokens of 3.1T dataset.

item.title: ModernBERT (International)
item.description: Parameters: 0.395B License: open Type: model "a proper workhorse model, for retrieval, classification, etc." https://bsky.app/profile/howard.fm/post/3ldod2afps62x

item.title: Granite 3.1 8B (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model

item.title: Bamba-9B (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: 9B License: open Type: model "trained by IBM, Princeton, CMU, and UIUC on completely open data. At inference time, the model demonstrates 2.5x throughput improvement and 2x latency speedup compared to standard transformers in vLLM."

item.title: o1-2024-12-17 (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model "o1-2024-12-17 sets new state-of-the-art results on several benchmarks, improving cost-efficiency and performance."

item.title: Falcon 3 (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 10B License: open Type: model "We conducted a single large-scale pretraining run on the 7B model, using 1024 H100 GPU chips, leveraging 14 trillion tokens... upscaled the 7B model to a 10B parameters model by duplicating the redundant layers and continuing pre-training with 2 trillion tokens of high-quality data."

item.title: Command R7B (Cohere)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model

item.title: Maya (Cohere)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model VLM.

item.title: BLT (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model Byte Latent Transformer (BLT), a new byte-level LLM architecture that, for the first time, matches tokenization-based LLM performance

item.title: Large Concept Model (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model "autoregressive sentence prediction in an embedding space." 7.7T tokens is a misprint, should be 2.2T as in paper.

item.title: Phi-4 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 14B License: open Type: model Use unsloth: https://huggingface.co/unsloth/phi-4-GGUF & https://www.reddit.com/r/singularity/comments/1i0kso4/i_fixed_4_bugs_in_microsofts_opensource_phi4_model/

item.title: Gemini 2.0 Flash exp (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: open Type: model Gemini 2.0 Flash was first model released, 11/Dec/2024. "New Modalities: Gemini 2.0 introduces native image generation and controllable text-to-speech capabilities" Announce: https://blog.google/technology/google-deepmind/google-gemini-ai-update-december-2024/ Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: Moxin-7B (International)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model "Fully Open Source" with pre-training code, configurations, training and fine-tuning datasets, and intermediate checkpoints.

item.title: 1T (Cerebras)
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: closed Type: model "For Sandia’s trillion parameter training run, Cerebras configured a 55 terabyte MemoryX device."

item.title: InternVL 2.5 (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: 78B License: open Type: model Benchmarks are estimates based on Qwen2.5 72B Instruct as the base LLM (InternVL 2.5=InternViT-6B-448px-V2.5 5.5B + Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct). "Notably, Qwen2-VL processed a cumulative total of 1.4T tokens, while our InternVL2.5-78B is trained on just ∼120B tokens [of vision]."Dataset... we identify repetitive generation as one of the most detrimental issues. In many open-source or synthetic datasets, a small number of repetitive samples—comprising merely thousands of examples in our Stage 2 data mixture—can cause the model to spiral into repetitive loops, particularly in long-form outputs or CoT reasoning tasks. This phenomenon undermines the effectiveness of test-time scaling strategies. To address this challenge and support future research, we designed an efficient data filtering pipeline to remove low-quality samples, thereby minimizing the risk of repetitive generation." Repo: https://github.com/OpenGVLab/InternVL

item.title: Llama 3.3 (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Drop-in replacement for Llama 3.1 70B, comparable performance to Llama 3.1 405B.

item.title: EXAONE-3.5 (LG)
item.description: Parameters: 32B License: open Type: model “EXAONE”=“EXpert AI for EveryONE”. Training tokens/ratio dropped from EXAONE-3 7.8B with 8T (Aug/2024) to this (Dec/2024) 7.8B with 9T to 32B with 6.5T.

item.title: Deepthought-8B (Ruliad)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model No evals. Llama 3.1 8B base.

item.title: Sailor2 (Sail)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: open Type: model SEA languages. Continual pretraining based on Qwen2.5. Project page: https://sea-sailor.github.io/blog/sailor2/

item.title: Pleias 1.0 (PleIAs)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: open Type: model Trained on the Jean Zay supercomputer, 192x H100s for 20 days. Dataset is new CC + Synthetic: https://huggingface.co/datasets/PleIAs/common_corpus

item.title: o1 (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: open Type: model "a version of our most intelligent model that thinks longer for the most reliable responses" System card about safety only: https://cdn.openai.com/o1-system-card-20241205.pdf

item.title: Nova Pro (Amazon)
item.description: Parameters: 90B License: open Type: model Multimodal, same performance as Llama 3.2 90B ∴ est 90B. Model card was hidden: https://assets.amazon.science/9f/a3/ae41627f4ab2bde091f1ebc6b830/the-amazon-nova-family-of-models-technical-report-and-model-card.pdf via https://www.amazon.science/publications/the-amazon-nova-family-of-models-technical-report-and-model-card

item.title: EuroLLM (Consortium)
item.description: Parameters: 9B License: open Type: model 24 official languages are Bulgarian, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hungarian, Irish, Italian, Latvian, Lithuanian, Maltese, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, and Swedish. "we use 400 Nvidia H100 GPUs of the Marenostrum 5 supercomputer" Also: https://eurollm.io/

item.title: DisTrO 15B (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: 15B License: open Type: model "About 14 DGXes scattered around the globe. Sometimes more sometimes less, it varies depending on availability. On average, around 112 H100s." https://x.com/bloc97_/status/1863675225810043331 "we introduce DisTrO, a family of architecture-agnostic and network-agnostic distributed optimizers that reduces the inter-GPU communication requirements by four to five orders of magnitude without relying on amortized analysis, enabling low-latency training of large neural networks on slow internet bandwidths with heterogeneous networking hardware."

item.title: INTELLECT-1 (Prime Intellect)
item.description: Parameters: 10B License: open Type: model Training complete 22/Nov/2024. Fully distributed training: "the first decentralized training run of a 10-billion-parameter model, inviting anyone to contribute compute and participate. This brings us one step closer towards open source AGI."

item.title: QwQ-32B-Preview (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 32B License: open Type: model Scores 1/5 on latest ALPrompt 2024 H2. Qwen with Question=QwQ

item.title: Teuken-7B (OpenGPT-X)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model 24 EU languages (60% non-English): bg, cs, da, de, el, en, es, et, fi, fr, ga, hr, hu, it, lt, lv, mt, nl, pl, pt, ro, sk, sl, sv. https://opengpt-x.de/models/teuken-7b-de/ & paper date is Sep/2024.

item.title: OLMo 2 (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Open Language Model (OLMo) 2 Apache 2.0 license for research and educational use. Paper coming. Data: 5 trillion tokens (1.2 epochs of 4T tokens) + 100B tokens (3 runs) + 300B tokens (1 run) merged. https://huggingface.co/allenai/OLMo-2-1124-13B & playground: https://playground.allenai.org/

item.title: Bi-Mamba (CMU)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: closed Type: model Unreleased, but will be replicated. "a scalable and powerful 1-bit Mamba architecture designed for more efficient large language models"

item.title: k0-math (Moonshot AI)
item.description: Parameters: 100B License: open Type: model Reasoning, maths only. Very little info available. Chinese. Long context. No paper.

item.title: Marco-o1 (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model No evals. Qwen2-7B-Instruct with a combination of the filtered Open-O1 CoT dataset, Marco-o1 CoT dataset, and Marco-o1 Instruction dataset.

item.title: TÜLU 3 (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Llama 3.1 post-training, worse performance on most benchmarks. Post training methods include new Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). "We perform supervised fine-tuning on new capability-focused synthetic data mixed with existing instruction datasets. We then perform preference tuning on on-policy synthetic preference data. We finish training Llama Tülu3 with our new method, Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards."

item.title: gpt-4o-2024-11-20 (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: open Type: model Material decrease in benchmark scores (GPQA: -13.37%, MMLU: -3.38%) compared to Aug/2024. Pruned? Quantized? https://github.com/openai/simple-evals

item.title: DeepSeek-R1-Lite (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: 67B License: open Type: model Scores 0/5 on latest ALPrompt 2024 H2 "DeepSeek-R1-Lite is currently still in the iterative development stage. It currently only supports web usage and does not support API calls. The base model used by DeepSeek-R1-Lite is also a relatively small model, unable to fully unleash the potential of long reasoning chains. At present, we are continuously iterating on the inference series models. In the future, the official DeepSeek-R1 model will be fully open-sourced. We will publicly release the technical report and deploy API services." https://mp-weixin-qq-com.translate.goog/s/e1YnTxZlzFvjcmrLLTA8fw?_x_tr_sl=zh-CN&_x_tr_tl=en&_x_tr_hl=zh-TW

item.title: Xmodel-LM (XiaoduoAI)
item.description: Parameters: 1.1B License: open Type: model SLM

item.title: Pixtral Large (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: 124B License: open Type: model Open-weights multimodal model built on top of Mistral Large 2.

item.title: f1 (Fireworks)
item.description: License: open Type: model "a compound AI model specialized in complex reasoning, that interweaves multiple open models at the inference layer. "

item.title: Qwen2.5-Coder (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 32.5B License: open Type: model https://qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen2.5-coder-family/ Jack Clark from Anthropic is saying it’s actually 18T tokens from Qwen2.5 + 5.5T tokens for a total of 23.5T tokens. That doesn’t seem right from my interpretation of the technical report.

item.title: Fox-1 (TensorOpera)
item.description: Parameters: 1.6B License: open Type: model Gold standard for dataset documentation

item.title: Hunyuan-Large (Tencent)
item.description: Parameters: 389B License: open Type: model Hunyuan-Large is pre-trained on 7T tokens, which contains nearly 1.5T tokens of high-quality and diverse synthetic data.' '389 billion parameters and 52 billion activation parameters, capable of handling up to 256K tokens'

item.title: SEA-LIONv3 (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: 9.24B License: open Type: model SEA-LION is a collection of Large Language Models (LLMs) which has been pretrained and instruct-tuned for the Southeast Asia (SEA) region. The Gemma2 9B CPT SEA-LIONv3 base model which has undergone continued pre-training from the base Gemma-2-9B model. SEA-LION stands for Southeast Asian Languages In One Network.' News: https://www.techinasia.com/news/ai-singapore-boosts-sea-ai-sealion-v3-model

item.title: AMD OLMo (AMD)
item.description: Parameters: 1B License: open Type: model 1 billion parameter LMs trained from scratch using 1.3T tokens on a cluster of AMD Instinct MI250 GPUs.

item.title: SmolLM2 (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: 1.7B License: open Type: model Base and instruct versions, with Apache 2.0 license

item.title: Aya-Expanse-32B (Cohere)
item.description: Parameters: 32B License: open Type: model "Aya Expanse, a family of highly performant multilingual models that excels across 23 languages and outperforms other leading open-weights models...we have collaborated with over 3,000 researchers from 119 countries to expand cutting-edge multilingual research... 220 language ambassadors from around the world who have been part of this release"

item.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (new) (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 175B License: open Type: model Absurd naming scheme. Paper addendum pp51-64: https://assets.anthropic.com/m/61e7d27f8c8f5919/original/Claude-3-Model-Card.pdf#page=51

item.title: Granite 3.0 8B (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model Announce: https://www.ibm.com/new/ibm-granite-3-0-open-state-of-the-art-enterprise-models

item.title: Granite-3.0-3B-A800M-Instruct (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: open Type: model Announce: https://www.ibm.com/new/ibm-granite-3-0-open-state-of-the-art-enterprise-models

item.title: aiXcoder-7B (aiXcoder)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Dataset: The Stack

item.title: Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Related paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.01257

item.title: Ministral 8B (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model "Introducing the world’s best edge models"

item.title: Yi-Lightning (01-ai)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: open Type: model "New MoE hybrid expert architecture" and https://x.com/01AI_Yi/status/1845776529185476613

item.title: Zamba2-7B (Zyphra)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Mamba2 "trained on 128 H100 GPUS for approximately 50 days using our internal training framework developed atop Megatron-LM"

item.title: nGPT (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 1B License: open Type: model "a novel neural network architecture, the normalized Transformer (nGPT) with representation learning on the hypersphere. In nGPT, all vectors forming the embeddings, MLP, attention matrices and hidden states are unit norm normalized...reducing the number of training steps required to achieve the same accuracy by a factor of 4 to 20, depending on the sequence length."

item.title: Inflection-3 Pi (3.0) (Inflection AI)
item.description: Parameters: 1200B License: open Type: model Inference via Intel Gaudi® 3 128 GB, on-premise available. Minimum spend $100 credits.

item.title: Inflection-3 Productivity (3.0) (Inflection AI)
item.description: Parameters: 1200B License: open Type: model Inference via Intel Gaudi® 3 128 GB, on-premise available. Minimum spend $100 credits.

item.title: LFM-40B (Liquid AI)
item.description: Parameters: 40B License: open Type: model 40BA12B. Some controversy/concern over company. Liquid Foundation Models (LFM). "Human preference optimization techniques have not been applied extensively to our models yet."

item.title: SFR-LLaMA-3.1-70B-Judge (Salesforce)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: closed Type: model Code coming soon: https://github.com/SalesforceAIResearch/SFRJudge "we opt to focus on datasets that evaluate modern (2023 and beyond) LLM responses, as older datasets likely contain lower quality responses from less capable models, with correspondingly stale annotations. We supplement human-annotated data with synthetically generated data to endow our judge models with specific capabilities (e.g., following fine-grained rubrics in evaluation)"

item.title: Emu3 (BAAI)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model VLM. Dataset estimates are based on the unrelated UW/Salesforce dataset MINT-1T (3.4B images, 927M documents) https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.11271v1

item.title: NLVM 1.0 (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 72B License: open Type: model Flamingo clone. "we use Qwen2-72B-Instruct as the default text-only LLM backbone. We also employ Nous-Hermes-2-Yi-34B for ablation study and faster experimentation... we use InternViT-6B as the default vision encoder"

item.title: Unnamed 1T (China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute)
item.category: China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: closed Type: model Trained on Chinese GPUs: "Ascend Atlas 800T A2 training server – a Huawei product listed as supporting the Kunpeng 920 7265 or Kunpeng 920 5250 processors" https://www.theregister.com/2024/10/02/china_telecom_model_trained_local_tech/

item.title: TeleChat2-115B (China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute)
item.category: China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute
item.description: Parameters: 115B License: open Type: model Trained on Chinese GPUs: "Ascend Atlas 800T A2 training server – a Huawei product listed as supporting the Kunpeng 920 7265 or Kunpeng 920 5250 processors" https://www.theregister.com/2024/10/02/china_telecom_model_trained_local_tech/

item.title: AMD-Llama-135m (AMD)
item.description: Parameters: 0.135B License: open Type: model Small language model (SLM). Trained on AMD Instinct™ MI250 accelerators. "Pretrain Dataset: We employed the SlimPajama and Project Gutenberg dataset to pretrain the 135M model. Project Gutenberg is a library of over 70,000 free eBooks approximately. This sums up to 670B tokens"

item.title: Llama 3.2 90B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 90B License: open Type: model Vision (VLM)

item.title: Llama 3.2 3B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 3.21B License: open Type: model Text (LLM). "Pre-training. [For Llama 3.2 3B] We prune the models from their 8B siblings and use logits from the 8B and 70B models as token-level targets (token-level distillation). We then use knowledge distillation to recover performance."

item.title: Molmo (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: 72B License: open Type: model ViT: Llava as Qwen2 (or Olmo) + CLIP. Multimodal Open Language Model built by Ai2. Announce: https://molmo.allenai.org/blog

item.title: Gemini-1.5-Pro-002 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: open Type: model Sparse MoE. Context window=2M. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: Qwen2.5 (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 72B License: open Type: model

item.title: GRIN MoE (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 60B License: open Type: model 16x3.8B "only 6.6B activate parameters". GRIN=GRadient-INformed. "GRIN MoE is pre-trained on 4T tokens as a Causal Language Model. The same training dataset has been used to train Phi-3 dense models"

item.title: Data-Gemma (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 27B License: open Type: model RAG/RIG: "the LLM is fine-tuned to produce natural language Data Commons queries alongside statistics"

item.title: o1-preview (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model

item.title: Reader-LM (Jina AI)
item.description: Parameters: 1.54B License: open Type: model HTML->Markdown. Specialist small model; outperforms GPT-4o general model, does not outperform Gemini Pro 1.5.

item.title: Pixtral-12b-240910 (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: 12B License: open Type: model "Pixtral was trained to be a drop-in replacement for Mistral Nemo 12B."

item.title: DeepSeek-V2.5 (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: 236B License: open Type: model "DeepSeek-V2.5 is an upgraded version that combines DeepSeek-V2-Chat and DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Instruct."

item.title: Yi-Coder (01-ai)
item.description: Parameters: 9B License: open Type: model 6B=3T tokens, 9B=+0.8T tokens, 9B-Coder=+2.4T tokens=6.2T tokens. See Yi 1.5 34B in this table

item.title: OLMoE-1B-7B (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: 6.9B License: open Type: model Open Language (OL) Mixture of Experts (MoE). "We train OLMoE-1B-7B for 5 trillion tokens, however, some recent dense models train significantly longer, such as Llama 3 with 15 trillion tokens. To the best of our knowledge, there has been no large MoE that has been overtrained as much as OLMoE-1B-7B. Specifically, taking the active parameters of OLMoE-1B-7B, our token multiplier is around 5,000 (5T / 1B). There are likely benefits to training even longer, but to what degree overtraining is effective for MoEs and how it differs from dense models still requires more research."

item.title: PLLuM (Consortium)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: open Type: model Polish Large Language Model. Not yet available as of Sep/2024

item.title: xLAM (Salesforce)
item.description: Parameters: 141B License: open Type: model 64K sequence length. Released under Apache-2.0.

item.title: LTM-2-mini (Magic)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: closed Type: model Context=100M tokens equals ~10 million lines of code or ~750 novels.

item.title: Rene (Cartesia)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: open Type: model On-device. "hybrid architecture based on Mamba-2, with feedforward and sliding window attention layers interspersed"

item.title: Gemini 1.5 Flash-8B (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model Announce: https://x.com/OfficialLoganK/status/1828480085353234535 1M context for all modalities. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: Pharia-1-LLM-7B (Aleph Alpha)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model

item.title: TTT-Linear (Stanford)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: open Type: model Test-Time Training (TTT) layers. Real-time learning by Stanford, UC, and Meta. Potential for frontier models in 2025+.

item.title: Jamba 1.5 (AI21)
item.description: Parameters: 398B License: open Type: model Jamba 1.5 Mini (12B active/52B total) and Jamba 1.5 Large (94B active/398B total) are also optimized for business use cases and capabilities such as function calling, structured output (JSON), and grounded generation.

item.title: phi-3.5-MoE (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 60B License: open Type: model

item.title: phi-3.5-mini (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 3.8B License: open Type: model

item.title: Minitron-4B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 4B License: open Type: model Pruned and distilled from Nemotron-4 15B: https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/how-to-prune-and-distill-llama-3-1-8b-to-an-nvidia-llama-3-1-minitron-4b-model/

item.title: sarvam-2b (Sarvam AI)
item.description: Parameters: 2B License: open Type: model Indic languages supported are: Bengali, Gujarati, Hindi, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Oriya, Punjabi, Tamil, and Telugu.

item.title: Grok-2 (xAI)
item.description: Parameters: 400B License: open Type: model MMLU-Pro=75.5=SOTA. Claude 3.5S MMLU-Pro=72.83. "Grok-2 has been tested on the LMSYS leaderboard under the name "sus-column-r." At the time of this blog post, it is outperforming both Claude 3.5 Sonnet and GPT-4-Turbo." [Alan: Grok is Heinlein, Sixth Column is also Heinlein: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sixth_Column ]

item.title: EXAONE 3.0 (LG)
item.description: Parameters: 7.8B License: open Type: model “EXAONE”=“EXpert AI for EveryONE”

item.title: Falcon Mamba 7B (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model https://huggingface.co/spaces/tiiuae/falcon-mamba-playground

item.title: Palmyra-Med-70B (Writer)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Medical. MMLU Medical Genetics=94.0

item.title: Palmyra-Fin-70B (Writer)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Financial. "across a variety of real-world financial use cases. It outperformed popular models like Claude 3.5 Sonnet, GPT-4o, and Mixtral-8x7b"

item.title: Zamba2-small (Zyphra)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: open Type: model Mamba2

item.title: Minitron-8B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 4B License: open Type: model Pruned and distilled from Nemotron-4 15B: https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/how-to-prune-and-distill-llama-3-1-8b-to-an-nvidia-llama-3-1-minitron-4b-model/

item.title: Mistral Large 2 (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: 123B License: open Type: model Fits on a single node for inference.

item.title: Llama 3.1 405B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 405B License: open Type: model Announce: https://ai.meta.com/blog/meta-llama-3-1/ Model card: https://github.com/meta-llama/llama-models/blob/main/models/llama3_1/MODEL_CARD.md

item.title: GPT-4o mini (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model Omnimodel. "OpenAI would not disclose exactly how large GPT-4o mini is, but said it’s roughly in the same tier as other small AI models, such as Llama 3 8b, Claude Haiku and Gemini 1.5 Flash." https://techcrunch.com/2024/07/18/openai-unveils-gpt-4o-mini-a-small-ai-model-powering-chatgpt/ "tested GPT-4o to identify potential risks, which we have addressed and plan to share the details of in the forthcoming GPT-4o system card and Preparedness scorecard." And related paper about instruction hierarchy: https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.13208

item.title: NeMo (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: 12B License: open Type: model With NVIDIA. "Drop-in replacement of Mistral 7B". "trained using Megatron-LM, part of NVIDIA NeMo, with 3,072 H100 80GB Tensor Core GPUs" https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/mistral-nvidia-ai-model/

item.title: Codestral Mamba (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model "Unlike Transformer models, Mamba models offer the advantage of linear time inference and the theoretical ability to model sequences of infinite length."

item.title: Mathstral (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model "We’re contributing Mathstral to the science community to bolster efforts in advanced mathematical problems requiring complex, multi-step logical reasoning."

item.title: SpreadsheetLLM (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1760B License: closed Type: model Notable finetune of GPT4-0125-preview "outperforming the vanilla approach by 25.6% in GPT4’s in-context learning setting"

item.title: Spectra (Consortium)
item.description: Parameters: 3.9B License: open Type: model AKA TriLM. "Spectra LLM suite, the first open suite of LLMs spanning multiple bit-widths, including FloatLMs, QuantLMs, and TriLMs, ranging from 99M to 3.9B parameters trained on 300B tokens."

item.title: next-gen (DeepL)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model "Built using our own groundbreaking, specialized LLM technology and proprietary training data, designed specifically for translation"

item.title: SmolLM (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: 1.7B License: open Type: model Dataset includes new Cosmopedia v2 synthetic data. 135M and 360M models,each trained on 600B tokens from Smollm-Corpus. 1.7B model trained on 1T tokens from Smollm-Corpus.

item.title: Mockingbird (Vectara)
item.description: Parameters: 9B License: open Type: model "At <10B parameters it's an LLM trained to provide optimal results for RAG and structured outputs."

item.title: FLAMe (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 24B License: closed Type: model LLM-as-a-Judge autorater. Foundational Large Autorater Models (FLAMe). Uses an instruction-tuned PaLM-2-24B model. Unrelated to Microsoft FLAME Jan/2023.

item.title: Step-2 (StepFun)
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: open Type: model Launched early Jul/2024: https://pandaily.com/stepfun-releases-three-large-models-of-the-step-series/ "StepFun, founded in April 2023 with the mission to “Scale-up possibilities for everyone,” unites top talent in artificial intelligence from both domestic and international backgrounds, and is dedicated to advancing toward AGI. The company has already launched the Step series of foundation models, which includes Step-2, a cutting-edge trillion-parameter Mixture of Experts (MoE) language model; Step-1.5V, a powerful multimodal large model; and Step-1V, an innovative image generation model, among others."

item.title: H2O-Danube3-4B (H2O.ai)
item.description: Parameters: 4B License: open Type: model Runs natively and fully offline on mobile phone. "H2O-Danube3 is a family of decoder only LLM models that use the general Llama model architecture adopting core principles from Llama 2 and Mistral with custom parameters determining the shape of each layer and total parameter count. We use the Mistral tokenizer..." MMLU for chat=54.74, base=55.18 via https://huggingface.co/h2oai/h2o-danube3-4b-base

item.title: Causal Axioms (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 0.067B License: closed Type: model "the training dataset follows a specific structure, we develop a custom tokenizer. Alphanumeric node names are tokenized at a character level, while special terms such as ‘causes’, ‘Does’, ‘cause’, ‘Yes’, and ‘No’ are tokenized at the word level... Our training setup consists of around 175k instances of sequential chains with size of chains ranging from 3 to 6 nodes... All models are trained for 100 epochs. [LifeArchitect.ai estimate is 12 tokens per node x 6 nodes x 175,000 instances x 100 epochs = 1.26B tokens]" Based on GPT-2 arch.

item.title: SenseNova 5.5 (SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: 600B License: open Type: model "The model training was based on over 10TB tokens [sic, taken as 10T tokens instead of 10TB=2T tokens] of high-quality training data, including a large amount of synthetically-generated reasoning chain data, which help to enhance its reasoning capabilities." & "The updates include SenseNova 5o, the first real-time multimodal model in China, which provides a new AI interaction model on par with GPT-4o’s streaming interaction capabilities"

item.title: Helium 7B (Kyutai)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model "1. The model is fine-tuned on 100K transcripts generated by Helium itself. 2. These transcripts are highly detailed, heavily annotated with emotion and style, and conversational. 3. Text to Speech Engine is further fine-tuned on 20 hours of audio recorded by Alice and licensed."

item.title: InternLM2.5 (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: open Type: model "The release of InternLM2.5 series contains 7B model size for now and we are going to release the 1.8B and 20B versions soon" [20B released around 1/Aug/2024]

item.title: Tele-FLM-1T (BAAI)
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: open Type: model Technical arch testing only, ratio is too low for decent performance.

item.title: YuLan-Base-12B (Renmin)
item.description: Parameters: 12B License: open Type: model "YuLan's training is finished on Jan, 2024 and has achieved performance on par with state-of-the-art LLMs across various English and Chinese benchmarks."

item.title: ERNIE 4.0 Turbo (Baidu)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: open Type: model "Ernie Bot has reached 300 million users since its launch [on 16/Mar/2023, public Aug/2023]" Jun/2024

item.title: Gemma 2 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 27B License: open Type: model Announce: https://blog.google/technology/developers/google-gemma-2/

item.title: CriticGPT (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: closed Type: model "LLM Critics Help Catch LLM Bugs" Announce: https://openai.com/index/finding-gpt4s-mistakes-with-gpt-4/

item.title: 4M-21 (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: open Type: model Vision model based on T5-XXL. Modalities: RGB, Caption, Bounding boxes, Semantic segmentation, Depth, Human poses, Surface normals, CLIP, DINOv2, ImageBind, Metadata, Canny edges, SAM edges, SAM instances, Color palette. Project page: https://4m.epfl.ch/

item.title: ESM3 (EvolutionaryScale)
item.description: Parameters: 98B License: partial Type: model Biology large language model: "sequence, structure, and function are all masked and predicted during training, ESM3 can generate in all three modalities." 1.4B only released.

item.title: PanGu 5.0 Super (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: partial Type: model https://x.com/faridofanani96/status/1804079517193113850/photo/1

item.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: closed Type: model MMLU=90.4 with prompting. Model card: https://www-cdn.anthropic.com/fed9cc193a14b84131812372d8d5857f8f304c52/Model_Card_Claude_3_Addendum.pdf

item.title: DeepSeek-Coder-V2 (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: 236B License: open Type: model DeepSeek-V2 with additional 6 trillion tokens.

item.title: DCLM-Baseline 7B 2.6T (International)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: partial Type: model New dataset: 240T tokens: 8× larger than previous SOTA dataset. DCLM-Pool is 240T, DCLM-Baseline is 3.8T: "we combine our 3.8T DCLM-BASELINE with the StarCoder and ProofPile2 data to arrive at a 4.1T token dataset. We train a 7B model for 2.5T tokens" and "We release the DCLM benchmark, framework, models, and datasets at https://datacomp.ai/dclm."

item.title: Nemotron-4-340B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 340B License: open Type: model Open-source equiv of Mar/2023 GPT-4 (1760MoE≈340B, 13T), same param count but 2x the tokens of May/2023 PaLM 2 (340B, 3.6T), competitor to Nov/2023 Grok-1 (314B, 6T). Trained on 6,144 H100s. ~1.3TB for inference. 50+ natural and 40+ coding languages. Trained between December 2023 and May 2024. MMLU 0-shot for instruct=78.7, 5-shot for base=81.1. Permalink for paper: https://research.nvidia.com/publication/2024-06_nemotron-4-340b

item.title: Apple On-Device model Jun/2024 (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 3.04B License: open Type: model https://lifearchitect.ai/apple/ Likely to be the Apple OpenELM model (Apr/2024). "two of these models — a ~3 billion parameter on-device language model, and a larger server-based language model available with Private Cloud Compute". https://machinelearning.apple.com/research/introducing-apple-foundation-models The server-based model is possibly Ferret, although it is more properly called a multimodal model (not just language). It could also be Apple GPT based on their Ajax framework: https://archive.md/f3C0r

item.title: MatMul-Free LM (UCSC)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: open Type: model "we explore alternative methods for mixing tokens without relying on matrix multiplications." Compared with Transformer++ based on Llama-2, not to be confused with the pre-GPT-3 American Express Transformer++ paper from 2/Mar/2020. Instead, Transformer++ is defined in the Mamba paper: 'Transformer++: A Transformer with an improved architecture, namely rotary positional encodings (Su et al. 2021) and SwiGLU MLP (Shazeer 2020)'

item.title: Luna (Galileo)
item.description: Parameters: 0.44B License: open Type: model Based on DeBERTA-large (440M). RoBERTa=162B token dataset.

item.title: Qwen2 (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 72B License: open Type: model Instruct MMLU=82. Instruct GPQA=41.9. https://qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen2/

item.title: Qwen2-57B-A14B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 57B License: open Type: model https://qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen2/

item.title: Skywork MoE 16x13B (Kunlun Tech)
item.description: Parameters: 146B License: open Type: model CN + EN. "(MoE) model with 146 billion parameters, 16 experts, and 22 billion activated parameters. This model is initialized from the pre-existing dense checkpoints of our Skywork-13B model."

item.title: Mamba-2 (CMU)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: open Type: model Analysis: https://tridao.me/blog/2024/mamba2-part1-model/

item.title: MAP-Neo (International)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model "first fully open-sourced bilingual LLM with comparable performance to existing state-of-the-art LLMs... we open-source all details to reproduce our MAP-Neo, where the cleaned pre-training corpus, data cleaning pipeline, checkpoints, and well-optimized training/evaluation framework are provided."

item.title: K2 (LLM360)
item.description: Parameters: 65B License: open Type: model "K2-65B is a fully reproducible LLM outperforming Llama 2 70B using 35% less compute."

item.title: Codestral (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: 22B License: open Type: model Fluent in 80+ programming languages

item.title: Aya-23-35B (Cohere)
item.description: Parameters: 35B License: open Type: model

item.title: Yi-XLarge (01-ai)
item.description: Parameters: 2000B License: open Type: model Still training as of May/2024: https://appserversrc.8btc.cn/FnDYlEC4STBhphu6M3NL4CKH43FW dead link, use: https://finance.china.com.cn/roll/20240513/6116857.shtml

item.title: Yi-Large (01-ai)
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: open Type: model

item.title: Chameleon (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 34B License: open Type: model Multimodal

item.title: LearnLM (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1500B License: partial Type: model Fine-tuned + prompted Gemini (Dec/2023). "The results of LearnLM-Tutor reproduce the performance of Gemini Pro, for example an MMLU score of 0.72 and MATH score of 0.33."

item.title: Sparse Llama 7B (Cerebras)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model https://www.cerebras.net/blog/introducing-sparse-llama-70-smaller-3x-faster-full-accuracy "For the 50% sparse model, we utilized 45 billion tokens of pretraining data, while an additional 100 billion tokens were used for the 70% model. This represents approximately 2% to 8% of the original 2 trillion tokens used to train the base Llama-2 model."

item.title: Gemini 1.5 Flash (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model 1M context length. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: GPT-4o (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model gpt-4o-2024-05-13 no longer easily available, so hidden in the Model Table rankings. Omnimodel. ‘[GPT-4o is] likely an early checkpoint of GPT-5’. https://twitter.com/drjimfan/status/1790089671365767313 ELO: https://twitter.com/LiamFedus/status/1790064963966370209 Demo: https://youtu.be/DQacCB9tDaw

item.title: Falcon 2 11B (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 11B License: open Type: model Announce: https://www.tii.ae/news/falcon-2-uaes-technology-innovation-institute-releases-new-ai-model-series-outperforming-metas

item.title: Fugaku-LLM (Fujitsu)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Japanese. CPU trained: 158,976+ A64FX CPUs (7M+ cores), zero GPUs. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fugaku_(supercomputer)

item.title: Yi 1.5 34B (01-ai)
item.description: Parameters: 34.4B License: open Type: model Uses 600B more training tokens than Yi 1.0 (Nov/2023).

item.title: YOCO (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: open Type: model With Tsingua. You Only Cache Once (YOCO). Long context "1M context length with near-perfect needle retrieval accuracy"

item.title: DeepSeek-V2 (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: 236B License: open Type: model Huge dataset, 12% Chinese "Therefore, we acknowledge that DeepSeek-V2 still has a slight gap in basic English capabilities with LLaMA3 70B".

item.title: ChuXin (Independent)
item.description: Parameters: 1.6B License: open Type: model "results on the ”Needle In A Haystack”(NIAH) tests indicate that ChuXin-1M performs well across all context window lengths up to 1M."

item.title: RWKV-v6 Finch (RWKV)
item.description: Parameters: 7.63B License: open Type: model RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN: https://twitter.com/BlinkDL_AI/status/1787834625211158562

item.title: xLSTM (ELLIS)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: closed Type: model New method LSTM to xLSTM, see also RNNs. Code/weights doesn't seem to be released. https://github.com/AI-Guru/xlstm-resources

item.title: Granite Code (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: 34B License: open Type: model MMLU=50 for 8B model only. Dataset: publicly available datasets (e.g., GitHub Code Clean, Starcoder data), public code repositories, and issues from GitHub.

item.title: Qwen-Max (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 300B License: open Type: model https://twitter.com/JustinLin610/status/1787584325367529509

item.title: Med-Gemini-L 1.0 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model Med-Gemini-M 1.0 and Med-Gemini-L 1.0 (Pro and Ultra finetunes) "For language tasks that require less complex reasoning, such as summarizing medical notes and creating referral letters, we introduce Med-Gemini-M 1.0 by fine-tuning the Gemini 1.0 Pro model. For other tasks that require more advanced reasoning, we introduce Med-Gemini-L 1.0 by fine-tuning the Gemini 1.0 Ultra model using a self-training method to enable the models to efficiently use web search."

item.title: TinyStories (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 0.033B License: open Type: model Precursor to phi.

item.title: Tele-FLM (BAAI)
item.description: Parameters: 52B License: open Type: model Also known as FLM-2. "We will open-source a 1T model checkpoint, namely Tele-FLM-1T, to advance further training and research." Discussion paper Jul/2024: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02783

item.title: Qwen-1.5 110B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 111B License: open Type: model Worse performance on GPQA (72B=36.3, 110B=35.9).

item.title: Arctic (Snowflake AI Research)
item.description: Parameters: 480B License: open Type: model "Arctic uses a unique Dense-MoE Hybrid transformer architecture. It combines a 10B dense transformer model with a residual 128×3.66B MoE MLP resulting in 480B total and 17B active parameters chosen using a top-2 gating."

item.title: SenseNova 5.0 (SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: 600B License: open Type: model GPT-4 scale; low media coverage; no demo in Western world. https://www.techinasia.com/sensetime-pauses-trading-stock-rises-30-model-launch

item.title: OpenELM (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 3.04B License: open Type: model On-device model (laptop, phone). Open-source Efficient Language Models (OpenELM). https://venturebeat.com/ai/apple-releases-openelm-small-open-source-ai-models-designed-to-run-on-device/

item.title: phi-3-medium (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 14B License: open Type: model Preview only, benchmarks being investigated as of May/2024.

item.title: phi-3-mini (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 3.8B License: open Type: model "phi3-mini can be quantized to 4-bits so that it only occupies ≈ 1.8GB of memory. We tested the quantized model by deploying phi-3-mini on iPhone 14 with A16 Bionic chip running natively on-device and fully offline achieving more than 12 tokens per second."

item.title: Llama 3 70B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Instruct MMLU-Pro=56.2

item.title: Zamba 7B (Zyphra)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Mamba1

item.title: HLAT (Amazon)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: closed Type: model HLAT=High-quality LLM pre-trained on AWS Trainium. Same arch as Llama 7B. The pre-training is performed up to 64 Amazon EC2 trn1.32xlarge instances with totalling up to 1024 AWS Trainium accelerators. Read more about Trainium: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/aws/what-you-need-to-know-about-the-aws-ai-chips-powering-amazons-partnership-with-anthropic

item.title: Idefics2 (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: 8.4B License: open Type: model Clone of Flamingo now using Mistral 7B. Named after Asterix and Obelix's dog Idefix (Image-aware Decoder Enhanced à la Flamingo with Interleaved Cross-attentionS)

item.title: Reka Core (Reka AI)
item.description: Parameters: 300B License: open Type: model https://www.reka.ai/news/reka-core-our-frontier-class-multimodal-language-model

item.title: WizardLM-2-8x22B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 141B License: open Type: model Base model = mistral-8x22b.

item.title: Pile-T5 (EleutherAI)
item.description: Parameters: 11B License: open Type: model

item.title: Zephyr 141B-A35B (Hugging Face H4)
item.description: Parameters: 35B License: open Type: model mixtral-8x22b finetune using Odds Ratio Preference Optimization (ORPO).

item.title: Rerank 3 (Cohere)
item.description: Parameters: 104B License: open Type: model RAG + semantic search, possibly backed by Command-R+.

item.title: gpt-4-turbo-2024-04-09 (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model This is such a significantly better model that I've added it here. This GPQA=46.5%, old GPT-4 GPQA=36%. https://twitter.com/EpochAIResearch/status/1778463039932584205 MMLU scores are unclear, but may have improved by 1%: https://twitter.com/OpenAI/status/1778602770784002136. Final benchmarks are here: https://archive.md/6Cc0Z

item.title: MiniCPM-2.4B (Tsinghua)
item.description: Parameters: 2.4B License: open Type: model MoE option=https://huggingface.co/openbmb/MiniCPM-MoE-8x2B

item.title: Ferret-UI (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Vicuna base, multimodal. Extension of Ferret from Oct/2023.

item.title: mixtral-8x22b (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: 141B License: open Type: model MoE=22Bx8, seq=65536.

item.title: Sailor (Sail)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model SEA languages. Based on Qwen-1.5. https://github.com/sail-sg/sailor-llm "Generally Sailor models consume around 200B tokens, completing a full pass through the SailCraft corpus once. However, the Sailor-0.5B model undergoes training with 400B tokens, equivalent to 2 epochs."

item.title: JetMoE-8B (MIT)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model

item.title: Eurus (Tsinghua)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Fine-tune of Mistral-7B and CodeLlama-70B.

item.title: Command-R+ (Cohere)
item.description: Parameters: 104B License: open Type: model purpose-built to excel at real-world enterprise use cases. Announce with no arch details: https://txt.cohere.com/command-r-plus-microsoft-azure/

item.title: Viking (Silo AI)
item.description: Parameters: 33B License: open Type: model Viking uses an architecture similar to Llama 2, with flash attention, rotary embeddings, grouped query attention and supports a 4k sequence length'

item.title: OLMo-Bitnet-1B (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: 1B License: open Type: model 1.58-bit quantized (ternary weights) means we can run a 70B model in ~14GB VRAM. See also BitNet b1.58

item.title: Aurora-M (International)
item.description: Parameters: 15.5B License: open Type: model

item.title: ReALM-3B (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: closed Type: model FLAN-T5 (Oct/2022) finetune.

item.title: Qwen1.5-MoE-A2.7B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 14.3B License: open Type: model MoE. "Of particular significance is the fact that, through upcycling, the necessity for training an equivalent volume of tokens as in the original model has been eliminated." I assumed half of the original 3T tokens

item.title: Grok-1.5 (xAI)
item.description: Parameters: 180B License: open Type: model Context=128k.

item.title: Jamba 1 (AI21)
item.description: Parameters: 52B License: open Type: model MoE. Open weights, licensed under Apache 2.0. Announce: https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.19887

item.title: DBRX (MosaicML)
item.description: Parameters: 132B License: open Type: model MoE. Trained for $10M on 3,072 NVIDIA H100s connected by 3.2Tbps Infiniband.

item.title: Stable Code Instruct 3B (Stability AI)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: open Type: model Context window=16,384. Trained on The Stack dataset.

item.title: EvoLLM-JP (Sakana AI)
item.description: Parameters: 10B License: open Type: model Japanese. Model merge 'our EvoLLM-JP-A is a merge of shisa-gamma-7b-v1, Arithmo2-Mistral-7B, and Abel7B-002' https://sakana.ai/evolutionary-model-merge/

item.title: RakutenAI-7B (Rakuten Group)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Japanese. Mistral 7B derivative.

item.title: Parakeet (Independent)
item.description: Parameters: 0.378B License: open Type: model Tiny model (378M) for testing

item.title: RWKV-v5 EagleX (RWKV)
item.description: Parameters: 7.52B License: open Type: model RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN: Built on the RWKV-v5 architecture (a linear transformer with 10-100x+ lower inference cost)

item.title: MM1 (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: closed Type: model VLM, outperforms Flamingo 80B (Apr/2022) across benchmarks. 2T text tokens + ~10B+ other text (estimate). Unreleased.

item.title: RFM-1 (Covariant)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: partial Type: model Commercial, multimodal for robotics

item.title: Command-R (Cohere)
item.description: Parameters: 35B License: open Type: model RAG and tool use

item.title: DeepSeek-VL (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Vision, based on DeepSeek-LLM-7B

item.title: AnyGPT (Fudan University)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Llama 2 7B backbone with new matrices ('reshaping the embedding matrix and prediction layer')
